author: doll-agent
content:
Added tests/api_proof.rs with 10 integration tests exercising every public API of ferrolearn-neighbors:
- api_proof_kneighbors_classifier / kneighbors_regressor
- api_proof_radius_neighbors_classifier / radius_neighbors_regressor
- api_proof_nearest_neighbors (kneighbors, radius_neighbors, both graph methods, n_samples_fit, shape)
- api_proof_nearest_centroid (fit, predict, score, centroids)
- api_proof_local_outlier_factor (fit_predict, score_samples, decision_function, novelty)
- api_proof_spatial_indices (KdTree::build/query, BallTree::build/query/within_radius)
- api_proof_graph_free_functions (kneighbors_graph, radius_neighbors_graph, sort_graph_by_row_values)
- api_proof_f32_compiles (smoke that all 7 estimators compile and run with f32)
All 10 tests pass. Final ferrolearn-neighbors test count: 160 (131 unit + 10 api_proof + 2 oracle + 3 proptest + 2 sklearn_equiv + 12 doctest).
